title: Author AbilityAcquisitionEvent + AbilityDischargeEvent — typed JIT runtime events
description:
Per [[agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine-2026-05-26]] + [[agent-abilities-pokemon-mechanics-with-topology-2026-05-26]]. The JIT load model needs typed events recording WHEN an ability is acquired (loaded into agent context) and WHEN it's discharged (released). Typed shapes: `AbilityAcquisitionEvent { agentSlug, abilitySlug, abilityVersion, acquiredAt: ISO-8601, triggerReason, triggerMatch: OperatingProtocolTrigger, contextWeightBefore: Int, contextWeightAfter: Int }` and `AbilityDischargeEvent { agentSlug, abilitySlug, dischargedAt: ISO-8601, dischargeReason: enum (completion / superseded / context-pressure / explicit-release), contextWeightFreed: Int }`. Append-only event log per agent under `agents/<slug>/private/universal/kura-spaces/timelines/ability-acquisitions.timeline.jsonl` (matches Shinji Techo timeline pattern). Substrate gains diagnostic capability: 'how often does claude acquire wd vs how often is wd in-context but unused?'

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- InferenceUsageEvent (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0) — acquisition/discharge events ARE structurally usage-event variants
